themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "In the fifteenth day of this month (בַּחֲמִשָּׁה עָשָׂר יוֹם, bachamishah asar yom)—Passover...". Word-study detail reinforces "לַחְמִ֜י: and my bread - food (for man or beast), especially bread, or grain (for making it)".

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses.

themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "God commands Israel to observe 'my offering, and my bread for my sacrifices made by fire' at...". Word-study detail reinforces "צַ֚ו: Command - (intensively) to constitute, enjoin".
